title: (Bullish Signal) HOV, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling HOV's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron A.I.dvisor identified 40 similar cases where HOV's MACD histogram became positive, and 36 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $132.95 crossed the support line at $115.05 and is trading between $138.99 resistance and $115.05 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/24/21 - 04/26/21, the price experienced a +37% Uptrend. During the week of 04/19/21 - 04/26/21, the stock enjoyed a +11% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/o5f2llwcnqv61.png?width=1521&format=png&auto=webp&s=62509fc869cd34e4adea4fe8a66d16a30cb547b3

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on April 21, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on HOV as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 55 of 68 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

Following a +12.75% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where HOV advanced for three days, in 228 of 278 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 189 of 239 cases where HOV Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 79%.
